news.t: BMO and REX Shares Launch U.S. Big Banks and U.S. Big Oil Leveraged & Inverse Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: BNKU is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Citigroup stock at 10.42%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 10.38%, Wells Fargo & Company at 10.32%, Morgan Stanley at 10.32%, and Bank of America at 10.28%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors U.S. Big Banks 3 Leveraged ETN (BNKU) is an exchange-traded note that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide three times the daily performance of an equal-weighted index of US large banks. BNKU was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.title: BMO and REX Shares Launch U.S. Big Banks and U.S. Big Oil Leveraged & Inverse Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca
data.text: NEW YORK , Feb. 19, 2025 /PRNewswire/ - In a demonstration of their commitment to the MicroSectors™ product line, Bank of Montreal ("BMO") and REX Shares, LLC ("REX") today announced the launch of the...
